basics.name: Walter Jahir Ambriz Reyna
basics.label: Backend & AI Engineer
basics.summary: Backend & AI Engineer with production experience building systems that connect LLMs, APIs, and live data sources into reliable, scalable services using Python and FastAPI. Specialized in multi-agent orchestration, LLM integration, and automated evaluation pipelines deployed in real-world environments. Experienced owning backend services end-to-end — from API design and integrations to deployments, monitoring, and CI/CD. Comfortable working independently in fast-paced, early-stage environments and translating complex business problems into practical technical solutions.

work.name: Backend & AI Engineer
work.summary: Built and owned production backend services using Python and FastAPI, connecting LLM agents with live biometric data and product APIs for a multi-role digital health platform serving 400+ users. Developed multi-agent orchestration systems and MLflow-based LLM evaluation pipelines.

projects.name: AI-Powered Interactive Portfolio
projects.description: AI-powered interactive portfolio with a retro-terminal interface and an integrated LLM assistant (WALTER_AI) capable of navigating the site and retrieving structured data. Features real-time interaction, GPU-optimized visual effects, and ultra-low CPU usage. Built with Angular 21, Tailwind CSS, and FastAPI.

projects.name: WALTER_AI Neural Core
projects.description: Production-grade Multi-Agent orchestration engine for AI-powered interactions. Features a Master Orchestrator that dynamically executes tools (Function Calling) to retrieve structured portfolio data, with real-time SSE streaming and execution logs under a Clean Architecture. Built with FastAPI & Llama 3.1.
